name: base
orientation_note: Print flat on bottom face; bearing pocket upward; no support expected for vertical bores.

name: fixed_internal_ring
orientation_note: Print flat on standoff-contact face; gear teeth upward; use fine layer height for teeth.

name: rotating_cage
orientation_note: Print drive gear flat; inspect central journal and orbit shaft supports after print.

name: orbit_pinion
orientation_note: Print flat on gear face; use fine layer height and deburr tooth edges.

name: hand_crank
orientation_note: Print pinion flat with handle upward if supported, or split support only under handle if needed.
